metadata.title: ELBTRONIKA – Immersive Art Gallery
metadata.description: Discover contemporary art and electronic music in an immersive 3D gallery.

common.demoHint: Fully-functional pitch demo. Real launch coming soon.

immersive.noAudio: Audio is recommended for the full experience.

recommender.title: Mood-based Recommendation
recommender.description: Describe your desired mood — our AI suggests matching artworks.

gallery.title: 3D Gallery
gallery.description: Experience ELBTRONIKA art in an immersive 3D space.
gallery.noScript: The 3D gallery requires JavaScript. Please enable JavaScript in your browser.

press.title: Press Kit | ELBTRONIKA
press.description: Vision, roadmap, team, and numbers for media and investors.
press.heading: Press Kit
press.vision: ELBTRONIKA is the intersection of electronic music and contemporary digital art. We are building a platform where artists are fairly compensated, fans experience immersion, and transparency is the default.
press.revenueSplitBody: 60 % artist, 20 % DJ, 20 % platform. No hidden fees. Fully transparent on Stripe.
press.privacyBody: GDPR-compliant from day one. No cookies without consent. No tracking pixels. Audit log for every MCP invocation.
press.roadmap1: Foundation: Repo, Design, Infrastructure, Auth, CMS
press.roadmap2: Product: Shop, 3D Gallery, Spatial Audio, Stripe Connect
press.roadmap3: AI & Compliance: Claude Curation, GDPR, Performance
press.roadmap4: Optimization: Testing, Lighthouse CI, Trust Harness
press.founderStory: Lou founded ELBTRONIKA as a solo founder from the intersection of Berlin club culture and digital art. Full-stack developer with a passion for fair creator economies.

pitch.title: Investor Dashboard | ELBTRONIKA
pitch.heading: Investor Dashboard
pitch.subheading: Welcome, Lee. Here is the current status.
pitch.forbiddenBody: This area is for investors only. Contact us for inquiries.
pitch.subtitlePreLaunch: Pre-launch — first sales after live switch
pitch.chartSalesNote: Projection based on comparable niche platforms. Real data post-launch.
pitch.aiCostBody: Anthropic Claude API for mood matching, artwork descriptions, and recommendations.
pitch.testCheckoutBody: Experience the full purchase flow with Stripe Test Mode.
pitch.testCardHint: Test card: 4242 4242 4242 4242 — any future date + CVC

tour.welcomeDesc: This is ELBTRONIKA — where art meets frequency.
tour.navDesc: Scroll through the gallery. The camera follows your gaze.
tour.audioDesc: The closer you get to a piece, the more intense the sound.
tour.detailDesc: Click a piece — story, artist, price.
tour.checkoutDesc: Acquire limited editions. The split is transparent: 60/20/20.
